summary: Frontend testing for 'Missed' session status feature on Schedule/log screen. All 7 acceptance criteria verified successfully.

issues: When navigating to a past week with no calendar events but existing log data, the stats strip still renders with Volume: 8.9k lb but Sessions: 0/0 — could be misleading but minor cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data via user_a@theprogram.app (seeded). POST /api/seed returned 'already seeded'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'Missed' session features are working. Calendar shows amber dots for past unlogged sessions. SessionHistoryCard shows 'Not logged' amber label + chevron. Expanding missed cards shows 'PLANNED EXERCISES' section with exercise names. Legend has 5 items. Week stats Sessions pill counts correctly.

verified_features.missed_amber_dot_in_calendar_grid: PASS — WED Apr 8 (Heavy Upper) and FRI Apr 10 (Speed Lower) show amber/orange dots correctly
verified_features.missed_session_cards_in_history: PASS — 'Not logged' amber label visible with chevron dropdown on both missed sessions
verified_features.tap_missed_session_expands_planned_exerc: PASS — Clicking Speed Lower card expanded to show 'PLANNED EXERCISES' header (amber) with Sled Push, Speed Deadlift, Reverse Hyper
verified_features.completed_session_shows_checkmark_and_st: PASS — Heavy Lower (Mon Apr 6) shows red checkmark, Sets 3, Vol 1.1k lb, Effort 7.0
verified_features.today_session_gold_border: N/A — Today (Apr 12) is Sunday with no training session scheduled
verified_features.legend_5_items: PASS — Completed(red), Today(gold), Upcoming(green), Missed(amber), Rest(gray) all visible
verified_features.week_stats_sessions_pill: PASS — Shows 1/3 (1 completed out of 3 planned = 1 completed + 2 missed)
